name: Dishpan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugars, liquid shortening, eggs, and vanilla until smooth.
2. Gradually mix in the flour, oats, baking soda, corn flakes, coconut flakes, nuts, and salt.
3. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 to 10 minutes, or until edges are lightly golden brown.
5. Turn off the oven and let the cookies cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before removing them.
